title: iva microcephala
intro: Iva microcephala, also known as the low-headmarshelder or low marshelder, is a type of flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iva microcephala include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the relief of congestion and cold symptoms. Iva microcephala can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
